arts.ttl: Kevin De Bruyne: Man City legend 'accepts' new role, set for 'crunch talks' with Pep Guardiola over future
arts.sum: Kevin De Bruyne is reportedly set to hold crunch talks with Pep Guardiola over his Man City future after accepting he will only play a bit-part role next season.

arts.sum: After their latest defeat against Liverpool at the Etihad Stadium, Manchester City are 20 points behind the Premier League leaders. arts.ttl: Man City transfer news: Citizens to use Erling Haaland to lure Arsenal, Liverpool target to Etihad?
arts.sum: Manchester City are reportedly hopeful of beating both Arsenal and Liverpool in the race to sign a £20m-rated midfield wonderkid.

arts.ttl: Key Tottenham ace in talks over new deal
arts.sum: It’s not been the greatest of seasons for Tottenham Hotspur, however, they could start off 25/26 with the signature of Rodrigo Bentancur on a new contract.
